message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant Client as "Client"
participant Shop as "Shop"
participant PAYONE as "PAYONE"

Client ->> Shop: POST prepare.php
Shop <- Client: 302 capture.php

alt [No Pseudo Card PAN present]
    Shop -> Client: GET capture.php
    Client -> Shop: 200 Credit Card Form
    Shop -> PAYONE: POST Card PAN
    PAYONE -> Shop: 200 Pseudo Card PAN
    Shop -> Client: POST capture.php
    Shop -> PAYONE: POST request=authorization
end

alt [With 3-D Secure]
    Shop -> Client: 302 3-D Secure Form
    Client -> Shop: 302 3-D Secure Form
    Shop -> PAYONE: POST 3-D Secure Password
    PAYONE -> Shop: POST notify.php txaction=appointed
    Shop -> PAYONE: Set Payment Status to "captured"
    Shop -> PAYONE: 200 TSOK
    Shop -> Client: 302 done.php
    alt [No 3-D Secure]
        Shop -> PAYONE: 200 status=APPROVED
        Shop -> PAYONE: Set Payment Status to "pending"
        Shop -> Client: 302 done.php
        Client -> Shop: GET done.php
        Shop -> Client: 200 Thanks
    end

    alt [No 3-D Secure]
        some time later
        Shop -> PAYONE: POST notify.php txaction=appointed transaction_status=completed
        Shop -> PAYONE: Set Payment Status to "captured"
        Shop -> PAYONE: 200 TSOK
        some time later
        Shop -> PAYONE: POST notify.php txaction=paid
        Shop -> PAYONE: 200 TSOK
    end

@enduml
